name: @ctrl/keycaps
description: Source-of-truth for CTRL's bundled builtin keycaps (ADR-024 v2 — currently builtin-irisy, merged from builtin-assist + builtin-create per ADR-002 amend 2026-05-30; user keycaps install into ~/.ctrl/keycaps/). Bundled into CTRL.app/Contents/Resources/keycaps/builtin/ at build time; seeded into ~/.ctrl/keycaps/ on every launch (shell/builtin_keycaps.rs).

scripts.validate: echo 'keycap manifest validation lands when ctrl-keycap-sdk schema is finalized'
